channel.title: GitHub Assembly Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Assembly in GitHub

item.title: openhwgroup/cva6
item.description: The CORE-V CVA6 is an Application class 6-stage RISC-V CPU capable of booting Linux

item.title: chrislgarry/Apollo-11
item.description: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.

item.title: bytedance/sonic
item.description: A blazingly fast JSON serializing & deserializing library

item.title: briansmith/ring
item.description: Safe, fast, small crypto using Rust

item.title: mytechnotalent/Reverse-Engineering
item.description: A FREE comprehensive reverse engineering tutorial covering x86, x64, 32-bit ARM & 64-bit ARM architectures.

item.title: Rangi42/polishedcrystal
item.description: An upgrade to Pokémon Crystal. Brings features and content up to date, and adds some original content.

item.title: pooler/cpuminer
item.description: CPU miner for Litecoin and Bitcoin

item.title: supranational/blst
item.description: Multilingual BLS12-381 signature library

item.title: lukechampine/blake3
item.description: A pure-Go implementation of the BLAKE3 cryptographic hash function

item.title: pret/pokecrystal
item.description: Disassembly of Pokémon Crystal

item.title: leachim6/hello-world
item.description: Hello world in every computer language. Thanks to everyone who contributes to this, make sure to see contributing.md for contribution instructions!

item.title: vxunderground/MalwareSourceCode
item.description: Collection of malware source code for a variety of platforms in an array of different programming languages.

item.title: Infineon/TARGET_CY8CKIT-062S2-43012
item.description: The CY8CKIT-062S2-43012 Board Support Package (BSP) provides startup and initialization code for the board.

item.title: aead/chacha20
item.description: ChaCha20 and XChaCha20 stream ciphers

item.title: riscv/riscv-v-spec
item.description: Working draft of the proposed RISC-V V vector extension

item.title: klauspost/reedsolomon
item.description: Reed-Solomon Erasure Coding in Go

item.title: videolan/dav1d
item.description: A read-only mirror of dav1d source code repository. The origin is at https://code.videolan.org/videolan/dav1d/

item.title: pexip/os-fribidi
item.description: Packaging for fribidi

item.title: giaf/blasfeo
item.description: Basic linear algebra subroutines for embedded optimization

item.title: BLAKE3-team/BLAKE3
item.description: the official Rust and C implementations of the BLAKE3 cryptographic hash function

item.title: xiph/rav1e
item.description: The fastest and safest AV1 encoder.

item.title: kanaka/mal
item.description: mal - Make a Lisp
